MO.vintage: ground rowsUpdatedAt 2026-05-14; air & stretcher-van rowsUpdatedAt 2026-04-16 (Socrata metadata)
MO.format_notes: Missouri DHSS Bureau of EMS license-management-system extract published on data.mo.gov (Socrata JSON API). 455 Ground Ambulance + 26 Air Ambulance + 5 Stretcher Van licensed services. Service level (BLS/ALS) and vehicle counts are NOT published in this directory. health.mo.gov PDF mirror (GroundAmbulanceDirectory.pdf) is Incapsula-blocked to this environment; the open-data API is the same bureau source. Contact-person and email fields present in the source were NOT harvested.

rollup_2025.volunteer_reliance: More than 70% of these services are at least partially reliant on volunteer staffing (verbatim)
rollup_2025.source_url: https://hhs.iowa.gov/media/16564/download?inline= (Iowa Emergency Medical Services Snapshot, Iowa HHS, June 2025)

IA.source_url: https://www.legis.iowa.gov/docs/publications/SD/17002.pdf (Attachment B - Authorized Iowa EMS Agencies, source: Iowa Department of Public Health, September 2013)
IA.vintage: full roster September 2013 (most recent full public roster located); roll-up counts June 2025
IA.format_notes: Sept 2013 IDPH roster published as a legislative attachment: 779 rows parsed with 2+space column split (a small number of two-line wrapped names merge imperfectly; treat row count as a floor vs the printed list). Columns: servicename, city, state, county, servicelevel, servicetype, base, personneltype, ownershiptype. Service-type mix parsed: Ambulance 288, Ambulance-with-Transport-Agreement 109, Non-transport 367, Air 14. The CURRENT Iowa service-program directory sits behind the AMANDA public portal (JS-only: https://amanda-portal.idph.state.ia.us/adpereh/portal/#/dashboards/index); no current downloadable roster found on hhs.iowa.gov; data.iowa.gov Socrata catalog has no EMS-agency dataset (resultSetSize 0).

NE.rows_are: distinct EMS service display names in the State of Nebraska NG911 Rescue/EMS Response Areas layer (977 polygons, 504 distinct services). This is a 911 response-area registry, NOT the DHHS licensure roster; no service level or vehicle counts.

urls_tried: https://dhhs.ne.gov/licensure/Pages/Rosters-of-Facilities-and-Services.aspx (page states, verbatim: "Emergency Medical Services/Providers - This roster is temporarily unavailable. Please call 402-471-0371 with any questions.")
https://www.nebraska.gov/LISSearch/search.cgi (license lookup exists but form is reCAPTCHA-gated; not scriptable)

https://dhhs.ne.gov/OEHS Program Documents/EMS Service Inspection List.pdf (2023 List of Periodic Inspections - an inspection-due subset of ~150 services, saved at ems_rosters/ne_inspection_list.pdf, not the full roster)

NE.format_notes: 977 response-area polygons pulled via ArcGIS REST paging (fields DsplayName, Agency_ID, ServiceNum, DiscrpAgID); attributes saved in ems_rosters/ne_ems911_areas.json.

KS.rows_are: EMS services that submitted 2019 patient-care records to KEMSIS, as listed by KBEMS "EMS Services Reporting - 2019" (as of January 31, 2020), grouped by EMS region in the source. This is a reporting roster, not the licensure roster; services not reporting are absent.
KS.service_class_definitions: KBEMS classes from the KEMSIS public lookup form: I ALS/BLS ground emergency+non-emergency; II BLS non-emergency only; III ALS-only interfacility critical care; IV restricted-location ground; VI ALS first response non-transport; VII air ambulance (rotor/fixed).

parked.what: current KBEMS licensed ambulance services roster with class per service
urls_tried: https://www.kemsis.org/lms/public/portal (ImageTrend License Management public portal - Angular SPA)
https://www.kemsis.org/lms/public/lookup (server-rendered search form; results route into the SPA)

KS.format_notes: 165 service names parsed from the two-column PDF (pdftotext -layout, 3+space cell split); region totals printed in source: 2019 submissions R1 11,351 (3%), R2 13,130 (4%), R3 65,531 (20%).
